overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut in a spacesuit floating through a dense asteroid field in deep space. The character drifts steadily between scattered rocks illuminated by a distant star, with the camera transitioning from an overhead angle to a rear view revealing a large planetary body below.

agents.ego_description: Floating steadily through the asteroid field, navigating between scattered space rocks with a jetpack or zero-gravity movement

entered.detail: Large rocky asteroid formation with rough gray surface texture
Numerous small to medium floating rocks scattered throughout the void
Bright white light source illuminating the scene from upper left corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-angle third-person view of an astronaut floating through deep space. The character drifts steadily forward through a scattered field of asteroids, with a large rocky formation visible to the right and a bright star providing illumination from the upper left. The scene is serene and empty, with only the gentle movement of the character and the floating rocks.

events.description: Camera transitions from overhead perspective to rear view, revealing a large white planet below and the star directly ahead

agents.ego_description: Continuing to float through the asteroid field toward the bright light source, now silhouetted against the star with a large planet visible below

entered.detail: Massive pale spherical celestial body occupying the lower portion of the frame
Large detailed asteroid with rough craggy surface passing by on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts to a dramatic rear-view perspective, revealing a massive white planet below the floating character. The astronaut is now backlit by the bright star ahead, creating a silhouette effect as they continue drifting through the asteroid field. The spatial relationship changes significantly as the planetary body dominates the lower frame, adding scale to the deep space environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene asteroid field that gradually reveals the immense scale of a nearby planetary body. It begins with a high-angle view of an astronaut drifting steadily forward through scattered rocks, illuminated by a bright star from the upper left. As the character glides past a large rocky formation, the camera shifts its perspective to a dramatic rear view. This transition places the astronaut in silhouette against the distant star while a massive white planet emerges to dominate the lower frame. The scene finally settles into this expansive composition, emphasizing the character's smallness against the backdrop of the celestial giant.
